bias.description: independent stock-public-C-API CTAS omits package verification, receipt, checkpoint, and destination mirror work
DuckDB has 16 internal threads while the canonical IPC scanner is fixed at the product-admitted width of 2
logical bytes are the exact 115421208360-byte materialized Arrow-vector authority shared with the product cell; physical bytes are the exact 1291273686 source IPC bytes only
the macro spill field is unavailable for this worker and serializes zero; matching DuckDB native peak_temp_directory_size is authoritative for temporary spill
measured worker runs inside a transient user systemd MemoryMax=16G cgroup

reference.name: stock_libduckdb_public_c_api_table_function
reference.semantic_work: CTAS from the same finalized canonical LZ4 IPC segments with identical row-key derivation; excludes CDF verification, transaction metadata, receipt, and checkpoint work
